name: MEP Systems Intake
description: Mechanical, electrical, and plumbing systems intake for construction and renovation projects. Evaluates a project's existing MEP conditions, proposed systems scope, coordination status, code compliance posture, and engineer engagement to produce an MEP systems profile with gap analysis, risk flags, and recommended pre-design and coordination actions.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Mep Systems Profile
types.description: Generated mep systems profile from intake session data.
